sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SPDR MSCI ACWI Climate Paris Aligned ETF (NASDAQ: NZAC) - Share Price
feed.summary: This article provides the current share price and historical performance data for the SPDR MSCI ACWI Climate Paris Aligned ETF (NASDAQ: NZAC). As of the report, NZAC's share price is $43.08, showing a slight decrease compared to seven days prior and today's opening. The article also includes detailed historical trading data for the ETF across various periods, including daily movements and annual performance.

feed.title: LogProstyle Inc.'s Equity Buyback announced on July 7, 2025, has expired.
feed.summary: LogProstyle Inc.'s equity buyback program, which was originally announced on July 7, 2025, has officially expired on April 7, 2026. The company had initially authorized a buyback plan for 1,086,910 shares, valued at $0.54 million. This announcement follows other recent news, including the discontinuation of a share repurchase program and consideration of a possible special dividend.

feed.title: Kyndryl (KD) HR chief reports 97,977-share beneficial stake on Form 3
feed.summary: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc.'s Chief Human Resources Officer, Mark D. Paulek, reported an initial beneficial ownership of 97,977 shares of common stock on a Form 3 filing. This stake comprises 49,836 restricted stock units and 48,141 shares held in a personal brokerage account. The filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment, detailing the composition of his holdings without reporting any transactions.

feed.title: KCHV Stock Price and Chart — NASDAQ:KCHV
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of Kochav Defense Acquisition Corp. (KCHV) stock, including its current price, market capitalization, key financial stats, and company information. It details the company's purpose as a blank check company formed for business combinations and offers technical analysis ratings. The article also addresses frequently asked questions regarding KCHV's stock performance, volatility, financial reports, and investment advice.

feed.title: Gladstone Land Corp Prospectus Filed For Up To $1 Billion In Securities
feed.summary: Gladstone Land Corp (LAND) has filed a prospectus to offer up to $1 billion in securities. This brief report, sourced from Refinitiv, indicates a significant potential capital raise for the company.

feed.title: Digital Realty Opens First Asia Pacific Innovation Lab in Japan to Help Accelerate AI and Hybrid Cloud Deployment
feed.summary: Digital Realty has opened its first Asia Pacific Innovation Lab (DRIL) in Tokyo, Japan, located at the NRT12 data center. This lab, established through a joint venture with Mitsubishi Corporation, aims to accelerate the deployment of AI and hybrid cloud architectures by providing a production-grade environment for testing and optimizing infrastructure, including direct liquid cooling. The initiative supports Japan's growing investment in AI and semiconductor technologies and allows businesses to evaluate high-density workloads and integrate with Digital Realty's global platform, ServiceFabric®.

feed.title: Kura Sushi USA Announces Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Kura Sushi USA reported strong financial results for the fiscal second quarter ended February 28, 2026, with total sales reaching $80.0 million, an increase from $64.9 million in the prior year. The company saw an 8.6% increase in comparable restaurant sales and significantly reduced its operating and net losses compared to the second quarter of 2025. Kura Sushi also opened one new restaurant during the quarter and reiterated its full fiscal year 2026 guidance, expecting total sales between $333 million and $335 million and opening 16 new restaurants.

feed.title: AbbVie Continues to Raise Quarterly Dividend Amid Patent Challenges
feed.summary: AbbVie continues to raise its quarterly dividend, reaching $1.73 per share, or $6.92 annually, since its independence in 2013, demonstrating strong cash flow despite challenges from Humira's patent expiration. The company is relying on new drugs like Skyrizi and Rinvoq, projected to hit $50 billion in sales by 2030, and growth in its neuroscience portfolio to sustain future profitability and dividend increases. Analyst sentiment is generally positive, with JPMorgan and RBC Capital maintaining positive ratings and price targets, anticipating significant earnings growth in 2026 and 2027.

feed.title: Inter & Co (Nasdaq:INTR) - Stock Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides a stock analysis of Inter & Co (Nasdaq:INTR), highlighting its current valuation, future growth prospects, past performance, and financial health. It notes the company is currently trading significantly below its estimated fair value and forecasts strong earnings growth. The article also includes various analyst and community contributor fair value estimates and recent news and updates for the company.

feed.title: IHG outlook trimmed as Middle East war weighs on travel demand, ups costs
feed.summary: UBS has cut its forecasts for Intercontinental Hotels Group PLC (IHG) due to the impact of geopolitical tensions, particularly the Iran war, on global travel demand. While IHG's US market performance was stronger than expected, this was offset by weaker trends in China, Europe, the Middle East, Asia, and Africa. The bank warns of potential wider economic consequences and disruptions to airline connectivity, though IHG's significant US revenue provides some resilience.

feed.title: KKR entities exit OneStream (OS) stake as merger pays $24 per share
feed.summary: KKR-affiliated investment entities have exited their stake in OneStream (OS) through a series of non-market transactions on April 1, 2026, coinciding with the closing of previously agreed mergers. Under the merger agreement, OneStream became a subsidiary of Parent, and holders of Class D Common Stock and Common Units received $24.00 in cash per share/unit. Various KKR entities disclaim beneficial ownership beyond their pecuniary interest, as reported in the Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Coterra Energy Investor Alert: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Adequacy of Price and Process in Proposed Sale of Coterra Energy Inc. - CTRA
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is investigating the proposed sale of Coterra Energy Inc. (NYSE: CTRA) to Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE: DVN). The law firm is examining whether the offered consideration of 0.70 share of Devon common stock for each Coterra share and the process leading to this agreement are adequate or if the company is undervalued. Shareholders are invited to contact KSF for a free consultation regarding their legal rights.

feed.title: ImmunityBio, Inc. Securities Fraud Class Action Result of
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has reminded investors of ImmunityBio, Inc. (NasdaqGS: IBRX) that they have until May 26, 2026, to file lead plaintiff applications in a securities class action lawsuit. This action follows a significant stock decline after the FDA issued a warning letter to ImmunityBio regarding promotional claims for its Anktiva cancer therapy. The warning stated that the company's advertisement misrepresented the drug's capabilities, leading to a 21% fall in ImmunityBio's share price on March 24, 2026.

feed.title: Coca-Cola FEMSA: An Irreplicable Logistics Machine At A Fair Price (NYSE:KOF)
feed.summary: Coca-Cola FEMSA (KOF) is recognized for its unique distribution network, strong financials, and growth opportunities across Latin America. The company's valuation at approximately 16x P/E is considered fair, especially when compared to its regional peers, and is supported by a solid balance sheet and digital initiatives. The author initiates coverage with a buy rating, highlighting KOF's consistent performance, resilience in varying economic conditions, and justified premium valuation.

feed.title: KKR entities restructure OneStream (OS) stake as merger pays $24 cash
feed.summary: OneStream, Inc. reported a series of restructuring transactions related to its merger with Onward AcquireCo Inc. On April 1, 2026, a merger effectively converted each Class D Common Stock share into $24.00 cash and each Common Unit into the same per-share price, while Class C shares received $0.0001. KKR-related investment vehicles, as 10% owners, were involved in these internal reorganizations, disclaiming beneficial ownership beyond their pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. Notice of April 13, 2026 Application
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is notifying investors of Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: KD) about class action securities lawsuits. The lawsuits aim to recover losses for investors affected by alleged securities fraud between August 1, 2024, and February 9, 2026. Investors who suffered losses have until April 13, 2026, to request appointment as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: New and improved Republic recycling opens in Peabody
feed.summary: Republic Services celebrated the grand reopening of its 54,000-square-foot Peabody Recycling Center, which underwent significant upgrades with Machinex Technologies. The modernized facility features advanced equipment, including AI-powered sorting systems, to increase processing efficiency to 35-40 tons per hour and create cleaner recycled products. These improvements are critical for Massachusetts' ambitious goal to reduce waste by 30% by 2030, enhancing both environmental sustainability and working conditions for the staff.

feed.title: Blackstone sells 13.4 million Legence shares at $54 each
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. is selling 13.4 million shares of Legence Corp. (NASDAQ:LGN) Class A common stock at $54 per share through a secondary public offering. Legence Corp. itself will not receive any proceeds from this sale, as the shares are being sold entirely by Blackstone-affiliated stockholders. This offering comes as LGN shares have seen an 80% return over the past year, with analysts expecting profitability this year.

feed.title: KKR entities restructure 94.5M OneStream (OS) units in $24 cash merger
feed.summary: KKR-affiliated entities have restructured over 94.5 million OneStream (OS) derivative securities, including Class D Common Stock and Common Units, as part of a cash merger. Each Class D Common Stock and Common Unit was converted into $24.00 per share in cash, while corresponding Class C Common Stock received $0.0001 per share. This Form 4 filing details the mechanical adjustments for a merger close and does not represent open-market trading.

feed.title: Enphase Energy, Inc. Notice of April 20, 2026 Application
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has announced a class action securities lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NasdaqGM: ENPH). The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made false and misleading statements regarding its ability to manage channel inventory and offset impacts from the termination of the Residential Clean Energy Credit, leading to overstated financial and operational prospects. Investors who suffered losses between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, have until April 20, 2026, to apply to be a lead plaintiff.

feed.title: IMMUTEP (IMMP) director Pete Meyers reports 4.05M shares and sizable performance rights
feed.summary: IMMUTEP Ltd director Pete A. Meyers has filed an initial ownership report revealing a direct holding of 4,052,173 Ordinary Shares and several blocks of performance rights over additional shares. These performance rights, totaling over 2.4 million underlying Ordinary Shares, have an exercise price of $0.0000 per share and are subject to specific vesting and expiration dates ranging from October 2026 to December 2030, contingent on Mr. Meyers meeting certain conditions. The filing provides detailed footnotes on the grants, vesting schedules, and expiration terms for each block of performance rights.

feed.title: Integrated Media Technology (IMTE) director Whelan files initial Form 3
feed.summary: Integrated Media Technology Ltd (IMTE) director Peter John Whelan has filed an initial Statement of Beneficial Ownership on Form 3. The filing indicates his directorship but reports no beneficial ownership or transactions at the time of the filing. This is a standard SEC disclosure required when an individual becomes an insider, such as a director or officer, of a public company.

feed.title: Assessing Genuine Parts (GPC) Valuation As Q1 2026 Results And Planned Company Split Approach
feed.summary: Genuine Parts (GPC) is currently in focus due to its upcoming Q1 2026 earnings release and a planned split into two distinct public companies by early 2027. Despite a recent softening in share price, the company is viewed by one popular narrative as 25% undervalued at $103.84 compared to a fair value of $138.50, driven by long-term demand for auto and industrial parts. Investors are advised to consider both the growth potential and watchpoints like cost pressures and tariff uncertainties before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Does BD’s New Connected Monitoring And Medication Tools Meaningfully Shift The Bull Case For BDX?
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (BD) recently launched new connected monitoring and medication management tools, including the HemoSphere Stream Module and the BD Pyxis Pro Dispensing Solution, aiming to integrate data-rich hospital workflows. While these advancements support BD's move towards higher-value software and data, they are not expected to significantly alter the near-term investment picture, which is still influenced by trade headwinds, China pricing pressures, and risks related to the Biosciences and Diagnostics separation. BD's projected financials include a slight revenue decline but an earnings increase by 2029, suggesting a 27% upside according to some fair value estimates.

feed.title: Duke Energy customers voice their concerns over the company’s proposed rate hike
feed.summary: Duke Energy customers in North Carolina are expressing strong opposition to the company's proposed electric rate hike of 12 percent for businesses and 18 percent for residential customers over the next two years. During a virtual hearing, residents voiced concerns about affordability, with one retiree highlighting the difficult choices they would face. The NC Utilities Commission is expected to make a decision on the rate increase this fall.

feed.title: COO at indie Semiconductor (NASDAQ: INDI) nets shares after RSU vesting
feed.summary: indie Semiconductor's COO, Michael Wittmann, received 12,539 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on April 3rd, which immediately vested and converted into Class A common stock. He subsequently sold 4,720 shares on April 6th to cover withholding taxes related to the RSU vesting at a price of $2.9861 per share. Post-transaction, Wittmann directly holds 137,954 Class A shares.

feed.title: indie Semiconductor (INDI) CEO awarded 34,527 RSUs, sells 18,420 shares for tax
feed.summary: indie Semiconductor (INDI) CEO Donald McClymont was awarded 34,527 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) as part of the 2025 Short Term Incentive Bonus Plan, fully vested and granted in lieu of cash. Following the conversion of these RSUs into Class A common stock, McClymont sold 18,420 shares at $2.9862 each to cover withholding taxes. After these transactions, he directly holds 298,500 Class A shares, along with significant holdings of Class V common stock and indirect Class A shares.

feed.title: Immutep Ends Key Lung Cancer Trial but Stresses Strength of Pipeline
feed.summary: Immutep has discontinued its Phase III TACTI-004 lung cancer trial due to a futility analysis, indicating it was unlikely to meet its endpoints. Despite this setback, the company emphasizes the strength of its broader pipeline, particularly the IMP761 program, with new data expected in early June. Immutep is conducting a root cause analysis of the TACTI-004 data to inform future eftilagimod development and maintains its commitment to disciplined execution and value creation.

feed.title: Workday (WDAY) president sells 5373 shares, still holds 165414 plus RSUs
feed.summary: Workday, Inc.'s President and CCO, Robert Enslin, reported two open-market sales of Class A Common Stock totaling 5,373 shares on April 6, 2026, under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. These sales were executed at weighted average prices of $129.2886 and $129.9297 per share. Additionally, 3,487 shares were withheld on April 5, 2026, to cover tax obligations from RSU vesting, which was not an open-market sale.

feed.title: Wabtec tops estimates on higher margins and backlog growth
feed.summary: The article states that Wabtec exceeded its estimates by showcasing higher margins and growth in its backlog. No further details are available to provide a comprehensive summary.

feed.title: Gray Media will post March-quarter results and webcast call May 7
feed.summary: Gray Media (NYSE: GTN) announced it would release its Q1 2026 earnings results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The company will also host an earnings conference call on the same day at 11:00 a.m. ET, which will be webcast live on their website and accessible via dial-in numbers. This announcement follows Gray Media's consistent pattern of scheduling quarterly earnings release dates and conference calls.

feed.title: EVP at Gladstone Commercial (NASDAQ: GOOD) buys 100 shares of stock
feed.summary: Gladstone Commercial Corp Executive Vice President Ryan Stuart purchased 100 shares of common stock in an open-market transaction at $11.48 per share, increasing his direct ownership to 4,400 shares. This transaction, reported via a Form 4 SEC filing, signifies a small incremental increase in his personal stake. The filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment regarding this insider trade.

feed.title: Genie Energy Ltd. Receives NYSE Notice of Non-Compliance Due to Delayed Form 10-K Filing
feed.summary: Genie Energy Ltd. has received a NYSE notice of non-compliance for delaying its 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K filing, primarily due to the need to restate audited financial statements for 2024 and 2023. The company is actively working to submit the comprehensive report within the six-month period provided by the NYSE. While the notice doesn't immediately affect stock listing, failure to comply could lead to delisting proceedings, though extensions are possible.

feed.title: Should Guardant Health’s (GH) Role in ENHERTU’s Japan Approval Require Action From Investors?
feed.summary: Guardant Health's InfinityAI platform was instrumental in obtaining Japan's approval for Daiichi Sankyo's ENHERTU, showcasing its potential in leveraging clinicogenomic data and AI for regulatory assessments. While this strengthens Guardant's position in the biopharma and data sectors, the article emphasizes that the core investment risks remain centered on high spending, negative free cash flow, and potential future dilution. Investors should consider the company's long-term financial health and growth forecasts despite this positive development in real-world evidence.

feed.title: Price to cash flow ratio of Franklin Street Properties Corp. – BX:WVH
feed.summary: The article displays the "Price to cash flow ratio" for Franklin Street Properties Corp. under the ticker BX:WVH. It notes that the market is currently closed with no trades. The period, value, change, and change percentage are presented, although the specific numerical data is not visible in the provided text.

feed.title: Morph Report Shows Stablecoins Reshaping Global Payments Infrastructure
feed.summary: A new report by Morph indicates that stablecoins are increasingly moving beyond crypto trading to reshape global payments infrastructure. In 2025, stablecoin market capitalization reached $312 billion, with transaction volumes hitting $33 trillion, surpassing Visa and Mastercard combined, largely driven by B2B payments. Morph projects settlement volumes to exceed $50 trillion by the end of 2026, with SWIFT potentially introducing a stablecoin settlement layer and many Fortune 500 companies piloting stablecoin payments.

feed.title: Cryogenic Air Separation Unit Market to 2035 Driven by Steelmaking Demand in Expanding Economies
feed.summary: The global Cryogenic Air Separation Unit (ASU) market is forecast to grow at a CAGR of 4.2% from 2026-2035, driven by industrial expansion in emerging economies and increased demand for high-purity gases in developed markets. Key drivers include steelmaking, electronics manufacturing, healthcare, and chemical processing, with Asia-Pacific leading regional growth. The market will see a shift towards operational efficiency, modularity, and integration with renewable energy sources, with major industrial gas companies intensifying competition and innovation.

feed.title: HubSpot's Strategic Pivot: Aligning Monetization with Measurable Outcomes
feed.summary: HubSpot is overhauling its AI monetization strategy to a performance-based model, charging customers for tangible outcomes rather than fixed fees. This move, aligning with market demand for quantifiable returns, comes after HubSpot reported strong Q4 2025 revenues but a significant stock decline year-to-date. The company is also enhancing social media integration and strengthening its board to support these strategic shifts.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser to host Buckhannon job fair and open interviews on April 16
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser is holding a job fair and open interviews in Buckhannon on April 16 from 4 to 7 p.m. at the Outpost and Event Center. The company is looking to hire manufacturing team members, wheeled equipment mechanics, and electronic technicians, and invites all interested individuals to learn about career opportunities and benefits. Attendees will have the chance to connect with the leadership team and apply online or in person.

feed.title: The HDFC Files| PART ONE: THE BANK NOBODY CAN FULLY READ
feed.summary: This article, "The HDFC Files| PART ONE," investigates the true control and origins of HDFC Bank, India's most admired private bank, questioning who was "pulling the strings" for the past thirty years. It reveals that American capital, specifically Citigroup, played a significant role by holding a substantial stake in HDFC Ltd (the bank's promoter) through Mauritius entities and by transplanting its management philosophy and key personnel into HDFC Bank from its inception. The piece argues that even after Citi's exit, its cultural and operational imprint remains, leaving HDFC Bank today as a bank "without an owner" in a formal sense, with implications for its governance and the greater financial system.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Terilyn Monroe Sells Shares of Guardant Health Inc (GH)
feed.summary: Terilyn Monroe, Chief People Officer at Guardant Health Inc (GH), sold 3,832 shares of the company on April 6, 2026. This transaction follows a pattern of 45 insider sells and no buys over the past year. Guardant Health Inc's stock is currently trading at $92.68, which is significantly overvalued compared to its GF Value of $53.19.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (KD) Shareholders Who Lost Money Urged To Contact Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP About Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (KD) shareholders who suffered losses are urged to contact Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP regarding a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Kyndryl made false statements about its financial health and internal controls after announcing the departure of its CFO and General Counsel, an inability to file its quarterly report, and a review of cash management practices, leading to a significant drop in stock price. Investors have until April 13, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: Invesco MSCI Global Climate 500 ETF declares quarterly distribution of $0.2088
feed.summary: The Invesco MSCI Global Climate 500 ETF (NYSEARCA:ACLG) has declared a quarterly distribution of $0.2088 per share. This financial action provides shareholders with a regular income stream from their investment in the ETF, which focuses on global companies addressing climate change.

feed.title: 64,665,255 Common Stock of Jefferson Capital, Inc. are subject to a Lock-Up Agreement Ending on 8-APR-2026.
feed.summary: 64,665,255 common shares of Jefferson Capital, Inc. are under a lock-up agreement that began on January 7, 2026, and will end on April 8, 2026. This lock-up prevents officers, directors, and selling stockholders from disposing of these shares or related securities for 91 days. The agreement aims to stabilize the stock price following a secondary public offering.

feed.title: Thompson, Gap Inc chief people officer, sells $628k in stock
feed.summary: Amanda J. Thompson, Chief People Officer of Gap Inc. (NYSE:GAP), sold 25,000 shares of company stock for approximately $628,385 on April 6, 2026. Following the sale, Thompson directly owns 86,228 shares. The stock is currently trading below its InvestingPro Fair Value, and the company has a strong financial health score and a history of dividend payments.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty director Mrkonic sells $243,759 in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty director George R. Mrkonic Jr. sold 452 shares of common stock for a total of $243,759, at a weighted average price of $539.29 per share. Following the transaction, Mr. Mrkonic directly owns 2,383 shares. This sale comes as the company's stock has faced recent weakness, despite delivering a 58% return over the past year.

feed.title: FitLife Brands posts Q4 revenue surge to $25.9M after Irwin acquisition; Q4 adjusted EBITDA $3.5M
feed.summary: FitLife Brands reported a significant increase in its fourth-quarter revenue, reaching $25.9 million, primarily due to the acquisition of Irwin. The company also posted a Q4 adjusted EBITDA of $3.5 million, marking a 14% year-over-year increase. While legacy FitLife organic revenue grew for the year, Q4 legacy revenue saw a decline.

feed.title: PYPL Investor Alert: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Encourages PYPL Investors With Losses to Contact the Firm
feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP is encouraging investors who purchased PayPal (PYPL) common stock between February 8, 2024, and February 2, 2026, and incurred losses, to contact the firm regarding securities fraud class action lawsuits. The lawsuits allege that PayPal made false or misleading statements about its revenue outlook and growth, particularly regarding its Branded Checkout offerings, which were deemed unrealistic. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status in the ongoing litigation, which was prompted by a significant stock price drop following a leadership change and missed earnings estimates.

feed.title: [Form 4] Trade Desk, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Trade Desk, Inc. director Andrew Vollero reported acquiring 12,304 shares of Class A common stock through restricted stock unit awards. These awards, granted under the company's 2025 Equity Incentive Plan and Non-Employee Director Compensation Policy, are compensation-based and vest over time tied to his continuous board service. The grants, totaling 11,341 and 963 shares respectively, were provided at a price of $0.00 per share, with vesting schedules varying for each award type.

feed.title: Raymond James reiterates Market Perform on fuboTV stock after guidance cut
feed.summary: Raymond James reiterated its Market Perform rating on fuboTV (NYSE:FUBO) after the streaming service lowered its fiscal 2026 adjusted EBITDA guidance to $80 million to $100 million, down from previous estimates, and reduced its fiscal 2028 adjusted EBITDA target to at least $300 million. This revised outlook, which implies an 83% EBITDA compound annual growth rate from 2026 to 2028, reflects investor concerns about the company's path to profitability, with the stock declining 62% over the past year. Other analyst adjustments include Citizens raising their price target to $15 and Needham adjusting theirs to $15 following a reverse stock split.
